pr_body: Adds get_user using a SQLAlchemy named-bind parameterized query.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,5 @@
 from sqlalchemy import text
+
+
+def get_user(conn, user_id):
+    return conn.execute(text("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = :id"), {"id": user_id}).fetchone()
